folio.label: 50v
folio.l: A myle brod , of twenty fote of space

note.notetxt: 204the ink on this folio is brown .ODR

folio.l: Late se now , if this place may suffice
Or make it roume , with speche , as is ©oure gyse
¢ Now Symond seide this Ioún , by Seynt Cutberd
Ay is thow mery , and æat is feir answerd
I haue herd sey , men sal ta , of twa thynges
Slike as he fyndes , or ta slike as he brynges
But specialy , I pray the Host dere
Gar vs haue mete and drynk´ , & make vs chere
And we sal paie trewely , at the fulle
With empty hand , men moun na haukes tulle
Lo here oure siluer , redy for to spende
¢ This Millere , to the toun , his dougúter sende
For ale and brede , and rosted hem a goos
And bond here hors , it shulde nomore go loos
And in his owen chaumbre , hem mad a bed
With shetes , and with chalons , faire I spred
Nat fro his owen bed , ten fote or twelue
His dougúter had a bed , al by hire selue
Right in æe same chaumbre , by and by
It mygút be no bet , and cause why
There was no roumere herberwe , in the place
They soupen , and they speken of solace
And drynken euäe strongö ale , at the best
Aboute mydnygút , went they to rest
¢ Wel hath this Millere , vernysshed his hede
Ful pale he was , for dronke , and nat rede
He ©esketú , and he speketh thorugú the nose
As he were on the quak , or on the pose
To bedde he goth , & with hi~ goth his wyf´
As ony Iay , she ligút was and iolyf
So was hire ioly whistel , wel I wette
The cradel at hire beddes fete , is shette
To rokken , and to ©eue the child souke
And whan æ dronken al was , in the crouke
To bedde went the dougúter , rigút a non
To bedde goth Aleyn , and also Ioún
There was nomore , he~ nedetú no dwale
This Millere hath so wysely , bybed ale
That as an hors , he snorteth in his slepe
Ne of his tayl behynde , he toke no kepe
His wyf bar hi~ a burdon , a ful strongö
Men mygút here routyngö heren , a furlongö

note.notetxt: 246here there is an interruption in the text, I suspect just a pose from writing.ODR

folio.l: The wenche routed eke , ¹ compaignye
¢ Aleyn the Clerk , that herd this melodye
He poked Ioún , and seide slepes thow
Herd thow euäe slike a sangö , or now
